payload.description: Established in 1998, serves 26 bus routes in Queens, transporting an average of 76,000 customers every weekday. Team includes about 536 bus operators, 137 bus maintainers, 15 dispatchers, and 17 line supervisors. 158 local and 169 express buses.
NYCT Paratransit department managing Access-A-Ride eligibility and project cost management
NYCT department that includes the Bus Service Planning team
MTA paratransit service for customers with disabilities

Part of NYCT's larger effort to modernize New York City's bus network and improve bus service borough by borough. The Draft Plan proposed 69 local routes and 19 express routes to better serve the borough's 650,000 weekday riders.
payload.status: Draft Plan released in late 2022; Proposed Final Plan expected later this year (2024)

payload.office: Operations Planning Department, Bus Service Planning team
